name: GD Culture Group Ltd
summary: GD Culture Group Limited (GDC), formerly known as JM Global Holding Company, TMSR Holding Company Limited, and Code Chain New Continent Limited, is a Nevada corporation operating through subsidiaries including AI Catalysis Corp., Citi Profit Investment Holding Limited, Pallas Capital Holding Ltd, Highlight HK, Highlight WFOE, and Shanghai Xianzhui Technology Co. The company is involved in virtual content production and AI-related services, with operations spanning the US, British Virgin Islands, Hong Kong SAR, and PRC.

products.name: Virtual Content Production
products.description: Services related to virtual content production industry as referenced in forward-looking statements.

products.name: AI Services
products.description: AI-related services provided through wholly owned subsidiary AI Catalysis Corp., a Nevada company.

partnerships.description: Joint venture in which Highlight Entertainment Co. Ltd. owns 73.3333% of total equity interest.
